name: codex-workbench
description: A low-friction Codex workbench package with one visible skill entrypoint for project intake, workbench generation, feature workflows, quality gates, and review rules.

interface.shortDescription: One entry for project AI workbenches.
interface.longDescription: Codex Workbench exposes one visible skill entrypoint and bundles its own project-intake and workbench-generation scripts. It creates repository-local AGENTS.md/WORKBENCH.md files, development flow contracts, product baselines, feature work packages, deterministic quality/runtime gates, independent review prompts, and validation/audit reports. Third-party and specialist skills are optional capability packs: they can enhance design, diagrams, tests, docs, CI, security, or AI eval, but users do not need to learn or install them before the workbench can run.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Workbench to set up this project's AI workbench.
Use Codex Workbench to tell me the next step for this project.
Use Codex Workbench to audit this workbench for sharing.
